appraisal_events.evidence: « La vraie influence, c'est celle du milieu intellectuel ! On est l'homme de son idée ! » ... « Tous les hommes d'une même idée sont pareils, » me dit-il, d'un air de défi ... « Il n'avait sans doute aucun souvenir que je lui avais dit peu de jours auparavant ... »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator shows Robert defiantly repeating ideas that the narrator had recently set out to him, while forgetting their source, which exposes him as an unconscious borrower and slightly ridiculous despite his self-assurance.

status_effects.explanation: His local image is diminished because he appears derivative and forgetful of the origin of his ideas, despite a confident staging.
